occurrence_sentence: Bristol and London-based quantum algorithms startup Phasecraft has won a UK government contract to explore using quantum computing to optimise energy grids as part of the Quantum Catalyst Fund.

interaction_phrase: won a £1.2 million UK Government contract
occurrence_sentence: Phasecraft – the startup led by top academics developing world-leading quantum algorithms – has won a £1.2 million UK Government contract as part of the UK's Quantum Catalyst Fund.

interaction_phrase: awarded a contract for a feasibility study
occurrence_sentence: Phase One of the Fund saw Phasecraft awarded a contract for a feasibility study to explore the application of quantum computing to optimisation problems within energy grids.

interaction_phrase: work with the Department for Energy Security and Net Zero
occurrence_sentence: Following the successful completion of Phase 1, Phase 2 of this project will see Phasecraft work with the Department for Energy Security and Net Zero to prioritise and attempt to address such optimisation problems with quantum solutions.

interaction_phrase: won a £1.2 million UK Government contract
occurrence_sentence: Phasecraft – the startup led by top academics developing world-leading quantum algorithms – has won a £1.2 million UK Government contract as part of the UK's Quantum Catalyst Fund.

interaction_phrase: Phasecraft work with the Department for Energy Security and Net Zero
occurrence_sentence: Following the successful completion of Phase 1, Phase 2 of this project will see Phasecraft work with the Department for Energy Security and Net Zero to prioritise and attempt to address such optimisation problems with quantum solutions.
Phasecraft will look to develop quantum solutions to this problem and will work with the Supergen Energy Networks Hub and the Department for Energy Security and Net Zero as part of the contract.
Phasecraft will look to develop quantum solutions to this problem and will work with the Supergen Energy Networks Hub and the Department for Energy Security and Net Zero as part of the contract.
Quantum computing has the potential to solve important problems in a number of sectors, not least the public sector, and we're glad that the UK Government shares this belief.
Phasecraft wins 1.2 million UK Government contract to develop quantum algorithms to optimise energy grids
